'''Kaon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]. It was inhabited by [[Scrange/Legends|scranges]].

==Description==
Kaon was hard-to-reach, little-remarked world located in the [[Back Spiral]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> The planet was ruled by the [[House of Tion/Legends|Tion royal family]] and had its own [[Kaon Security|security force]].<ref name="KUS" />

==History==
{{Quote|Four worlds have been completely overrun. A fifth, Kaon, is down to a handful of survivors battling for their lives. Among those survivors are several nobles related to the ruling family. But we will have to act quickly if we want to rescue them.|[[Darth Nurin]], during the [[Tion Hegemony rakghoul outbreak]]|<ref name="SWTORCiGC">{{TORcite|type=general|Trouble in the Tion Hegemony|Vaiken Spacedock}}</ref>}}
Originally, Kaon was a trade hub within [[Xim's empire]]. After the Empire collapsed, it was revisited centuries later when the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] fractured and Tionese [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Matteus Zaym]] fled to the planet to avoid assassination. He eventually proved himself as a capable administrator, restoring Kaon's trade ports and building a massive palace, and therefore restored the planet back to its former glory.<ref name="Kaon-codex">{{TORcite|type=codex|Kaon}}</ref>

During the [[Galactic War]], Kaon, along with other [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] worlds, was the site of a [[Rakghoul plague/Legends|rakghoul plague]] [[Tion Hegemony rakghoul outbreak|outbreak]] that infected and [[Death/Legends|killed]] many military personnel and civilians.<ref name="KUS" />

[[Time/Legends|Millennia]] later, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] had a [[Dooku's castle (Kaon)|castle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Kaon served as his primary base of operations after Dooku was forced to flee [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The appearance of Kaon in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' was designed by the art team headed by lead artist [[Andrew Collins]].<ref name="ArtStation">{{ArtStation|username=acollins|url=artwork/l6laG|name=[[Andrew Collins]]|text=SWTOR Interiors}}</ref>
